content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
( 
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DispositionID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SalesDistrictID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[RankID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadSubSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AppointmentID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SalesRep1_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SalesRep2_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallBack_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PromoterID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadNumber] [int]  NULL,
	[EntryDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[DateEntered] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ApptDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[CallBackDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[DateReceived] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[FollowUpDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[DeferDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ApptSet] [bit]  NULL,
	[Verified] [bit]  NULL,
	[Confirmed] [bit]  NULL,
	[Issued] [bit]  NULL,
	[NetIssued] [bit]  NULL,
	[Sat] [bit]  NULL,
	[Sold] [bit]  NULL,
	[EverSet] [bit]  NULL,
	[EverVerified] [bit]  NULL,
	[EverIssued] [bit]  NULL,
	[EverNetIssued] [bit]  NULL,
	[EverSat] [bit]  NULL,
	[EverConfirmed] [bit]  NULL,
	[SetBy_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[VerifiedBy_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ApptDuration] [int]  NULL,
	[GrossSalesAmount] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[SalesRepSplit] [float]  NULL,
	[LastCallDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LastCallResultID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[LeadScore_LogisticRegressionRank] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[LeadScore_RegressionRank] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Initial_LikelihoodToBuy] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Initial_LikelySaleAmount] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Initial_ExpectedValue] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Current_LikelihoodToBuy] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Current_LikelySaleAmount] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Current_ExpectedValue] [money]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CustomerID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ProductID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_DispositionID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_LeadSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_SalesDistrictID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_RankID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadSubSourceID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_AppointmentID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CallBack_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_SetBy_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_VerifiedBy_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_PromoterID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LastCallResultID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100) NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH (LeadID),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
